mission: Building Dreams, One Room at a Time
tagline: Creating life-changing home makeovers for children with special needs
address: 250 Hembree Park Drive, Suite 106, Roswell GA 30076

hero.headline: Building *dreams*, one room at a time
hero.subheadline: We create life-changing spaces for children with special needs — dream bedrooms, accessible bathrooms, and therapy rooms — all at no cost to families.
